title: Enable WAL archiving for PITR
outcome: WAL files are archived and point-in-time recovery is possible.
facts: WAL archiving requires archive_command and storage destination
concepts: PITR depends on base backups plus continuous WAL

steps.completion: New WAL segments appear in archive destination

title: Create physical replication slot
outcome: Replication slot exists and protects required WAL retention for replica.
facts: Unused slots can cause WAL bloat
concepts: Replication slots prevent premature WAL removal

steps.completion: Slot shows active and retained WAL advances

title: Tune autovacuum thresholds for hot table
outcome: Autovacuum runs at an appropriate cadence for high-churn tables.
facts: Default thresholds may be too lax for high-update tables
concepts: Autovacuum controls table bloat and XID risk

steps.text: Identify hot table bloat and update rate
Monitor vacuum frequency and bloat trend
steps.completion: Vacuum cadence improves and bloat growth slows

title: Rotate PostgreSQL server TLS certificate
outcome: Database endpoint presents renewed TLS certificate.
facts: Certificate/key paths must be readable by postgres user

steps.text: Place new certificate and key on server
Update SSL file references if needed

steps.completion: Client TLS inspection shows new certificate

title: Create role with least-privilege schema access
outcome: Application role has only required database privileges.
facts: Default public schema grants may be over-permissive

steps.text: Create login role and membership structure

steps.completion: Role can perform required actions and denied extras

title: Run controlled failover to standby
outcome: Primary role transfers to standby with minimal service disruption.
facts: Replication lag must be acceptable before promotion

steps.text: Confirm standby replay lag and health
Validate application connectivity and data consistency

title: Set pg_hba.conf to restrict client networks
outcome: Only approved client networks can authenticate to PostgreSQL.

steps.text: Update pg_hba.conf with approved CIDRs and auth methods
Test allowed and disallowed source connectivity
steps.completion: Approved networks connect, unauthorized networks denied

title: Enable pg_stat_statements extension
outcome: Query performance statistics are available for analysis.

title: Configure base backup schedule
outcome: Regular base backups run and retention policy is enforced.
facts: Base backup cadence must align with RPO

steps.completion: Schedule and retention documented and configured

steps.text: Verify restore test from backup set

title: Partition large event table by month
outcome: Large table is partitioned, improving maintenance and query behavior.
facts: Partition pruning depends on query predicates

steps.text: Create partitioned parent and child tables

title: Increase max_connections with pooler alignment
outcome: Connection limits are tuned without destabilizing memory usage.
facts: High max_connections increases backend memory pressure

steps.text: Assess current connection profile and pooler settings

steps.completion: Connection saturation and latency remain within targets

title: Apply row-level security policy on tenant table
outcome: Tenant data access is constrained by row-level security rules.

steps.completion: Policy exists and references tenant context

title: Reindex bloated index concurrently
outcome: Target index bloat is reduced with minimal lock impact.

steps.text: Validate index size and query plan health
steps.completion: Index bloat reduced and plans remain stable

title: Set statement_timeout for application role
outcome: Runaway queries are bounded by role-level timeout.
facts: Timeouts should balance protection and legitimate long jobs

steps.text: Reconnect app sessions to pick up setting

title: Promote standby and rebuild old primary as replica
outcome: Topology rebalanced with healthy replication after failover.
facts: Old primary must not rejoin as divergent primary

steps.text: Promote standby and confirm write leadership
Reinitialize old primary from new base backup

steps.completion: Streaming replication healthy and in sync

title: Enable logical replication publication for selected tables
outcome: Publication streams change events for selected tables.
facts: Primary key requirements affect update/delete replication

title: Audit superuser role assignments
outcome: Superuser assignments are reviewed and reduced to approved principals.

title: Vacuum analyze critical OLTP tables
outcome: Planner statistics refreshed and table bloat risk reduced.
facts: ANALYZE updates planner stats used for query planning
concepts: Maintenance for planner quality and storage health
